name: ChatGPT
description: General-purpose conversational AI for drafting, research, and coding help.
approvedUseCases: Brainstorming with public information only after policy sign-off.
blockedUseCases: Customer support transcripts, HR records, or any credentials.
notes: Enterprise terms and data retention still under legal review.

name: Claude
description: Conversational AI with strong long-context support.
approvedUseCases: Engineering team may use with internal docs that exclude customer PII.
blockedUseCases: Finance approvals, legal advice, or regulated health data.
notes: Restricted to engineering until SSO is enabled.

name: Gemini
blockedUseCases: Any workspace data classified confidential or above until review completes.

name: Cursor
approvedUseCases: Internal application development with non-customer codebases.
blockedUseCases: Production secrets, customer databases, or regulated data in prompts.
notes: Privacy mode required; no training on code per vendor settings.

name: Microsoft Copilot
approvedUseCases: M365 users with company tenant and DLP policies enabled.
blockedUseCases: Personal Microsoft accounts or exports outside tenant.
notes: Covered under existing Microsoft enterprise agreement.

name: Grammarly
approvedUseCases: Marketing drafts with no customer names or contract language.
blockedUseCases: Legal documents, customer emails, or source code.
notes: Business plan only; browser extension disabled org-wide.

name: Fireflies
description: AI meeting notes and transcription bot.
blockedUseCases: All company meetings until data retention and consent process approved.
notes: Blocked due to unclear retention and bot join policies.

name: Perplexity
description: AI search and research with citations.
approvedUseCases: Public market research and non-sensitive competitive analysis.
blockedUseCases: Internal strategy documents, customer lists, or credentials.

name: Replit AI
description: Cloud IDE with integrated AI coding features.
blockedUseCases: Any production code or secrets; personal shadow IT usage.
